channel.title: Math on Zhiyang's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Math on Zhiyang's Blog

item.title: Sampling, sampling, and sampling!
item.description: Sampling methods, from rejection sampling to Markov Chain Monte Carlo.

item.title: Perron-Frobenius Theorem and the Stationary Distribution for Markov Chains
item.description: Proof of the uniqueness of stationary distribution for finite irreducible Markov chains, using Perron-Frobenius Theorem

item.title: Understanding Diffusion Models
item.description: From differential equation to diffusion models

item.title: What if Each Number is a Polynomial?
item.description: 关于数论的一些很久以前的小想法 / Some naive ideas about number theory years ago …

item.title: FFT On the Road
item.description: Guide to implement FFT in C++ with parallelism
